title: astroloma ciliatum
intro: Astroloma ciliatum, also known as the native greenhood orchid, is a plant species native to Western Australia. The medicinal properties of Astroloma ciliatum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Astroloma ciliatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
